Caribbean Corn Soup
$12.00
Chef Emily’s signature soup—creamy coconut milk, corn, split peas, potato, celery, pumpkin, and island spices. A guest favorite everyone’s been asking for. Vegan. Gluten-Friendly.
Jerk Chicken Egg Rolls
$14.00
Crispy rolls filled with jerk chicken, cabbage, and bell peppers, served with a jerk garlic aioli for dipping. May contain bone. Halal.
Fried Cauliflower
$10.00
Crispy fried cauliflower bites served with a garlic aioli dip.
Jalapeno Cheese Rolls
$12.00
A fusion of cheese and jalapeno pieces hand-rolled in a crispy spring roll wrapper, served with a sweet chili sauce.
Macaroni Pie
$12.00
Creamy macaroni layered with a rich blend of cheeses and Caribbean spices, baked to golden perfection.
Double Doubles
$12.00
So good you can't just have one of this Classic Trinidadian street food, featuring two sets of soft flatbreads filled with spiced chickpeas, cucumber chutney, and tamarind sauce. Vegan. Available until sold out.
Mains
Thu-Sat 4 PM - 9 PM
Roti
$18.00
Tender chickpeas and potatoes simmered in a flavorful curry sauce with Caribbean spices. Accompanied by your choice of veggies and Buss Up Shut Roti or garlic naan. Vegetarian or Add Curry Chicken (+$13) or Curry Goat (+$20).
Vegan Plate
$18.00
Pick three of your favorite vegan items for the price of just two! Gluten-Friendly. Choose from steamed veggies, callaloo, white rice, rice & peas, chana & potato, and plantains.  (Please note plantains are not a suitable for strict vegan or gluten-free diets)
Rasta Pasta
$18.00
A symphony of flavors featuring penne pasta tossed in house-made cream sauce, a blend of Caribbean spices, bell peppers. Add your choice of protein (Oxtail Rasta Pasta +$28, Salmon +$20, Jerk Chicken +13)
Stew Chicken
$29.00
48-hour marinated, brown-sugar caramelized chicken, simmered in savory herbs, peppers, onions, and Caribbean spices. Accompanied by your choice of rice and veggies. Halal.
Curry Chicken
$29.00
48-hour marinated, succulent chicken in curry sauce, garlic, thyme, turmeric, featuring a blend of Caribbean spices. Accompanied by your choice of veggies and rice. Gluten-Friendly. Halal.
Jerk Chicken
$29.00
48-hour marinated, smoked leg quarters in a flavorful jerk seasoning, bold Caribbean spice rub, and charred finish. Accompanied by your choice of rice and veggies. Gluten-Friendly. Halal.
Curry Goat
$38.00
48-hour marinated, tender slow-cooked goat meat, Trinidad-style curry, garlic, thyme, turmeric, infused with island spices and herbs. Accompanied by veggies and your choice of rice. Gluten-Friendly.
Grilled Salmon
$38.00
Grilled salmon seasoned with Caribbean spices and topped with a tamarind glaze or jerked. Accompanied by your choice of rice and veggies. Gluten-Friendly. May contain bone.
Brown Stew Oxtail
$44.00
48-hour marinated, juicy fall off the bone oxtail, slow-cooked for over 5 hours with spices, onions, and peppers, in a hearty, flavorful gravy. Accompanied by your choice of rice and veggies.
Sides
Thu-Sat 4 PM - 9 PM
Fried Sweet Plantains
$7.00
Four pieces of sweet and ripe plantains, sliced and lightly fried to caramelized perfection.
Steamed Vegetables
$7.00
Garden-fresh vegetables (cabbage, bell peppers, carrots, green beans, corn, green peas) delicately steamed to preserve their natural flavors and nutrients, with a touch of island seasoning. Vegan. Gluten-Friendly.
Trinidad Callaloo
$8.00
Trini-style callaloo slow-cooked, made with spinach, okra, coconut milk and herbs. Vegan. Gluten-Friendly.
Rice & Peas
$7.00
Savory red kidney beans simmered with coconut milk, herbs, and spices mixed with rice. Vegan. Gluten-Friendly.
White Rice
$7.00
Fluffy, aromatic white rice cooked to perfection. Vegan. Gluten-Friendly.
Macaroni Pie
$12.00
Creamy macaroni layered with a rich blend of cheeses and Caribbean spices, baked to golden perfection.
Garlic Naan
$7.00
Two flavorful flatbreads made with real buttermilk ghee and fire-roasted garlic.

Chocolate Mousse Cake
$11.00
3-layer cake featuring a traditional chocolate base, a chocolate mousse layer and a white chocolate mousse layer. Made with dark chocolate (60% cacao).
Rum Cake
$12.00
Moist Caribbean sponge soaked in spiced rum and glazed with a buttery finish.
